description_te: పేద కుటుంబాలకు ఉచిత ఇల్లు. 30 లక్షల ఇళ్ళు నిర్మించే లక్ష్యం. TIDCO/YSR housing layouts.
description_en: Free houses for poor families. Target of 30 lakh houses through TIDCO/YSR housing layouts.

eligibility_criteria.housing: Must not own a pucca house
eligibility_criteria.residence: Must be a resident of AP for at least 10 years

benefit_amount: Free house (apartment/independent house) — ₹3-5 lakhs government subsidy
application_process_te:
1. సచివాలయంలో VRO/Welfare Assistant దగ్గర apply
2. House-site survey
3. Lottery system ద్వారా allotment
4. Housing layout లో site allotment
5. Construction start + beneficiary contribution (if any)
